description: SCOR Incidents. Analyst-centric, visual-driven catalog of worked-example cross-domain incidents that the SCOR five-layer schema classifies coherently. Each entry carries an exposure-domain tag (Kinetic, Non-kinetic, EW, Cyber Warfare, Other) plus PCE/SEG/SVC/AST/AN tags, so analysts can pivot from one incident to peers along any axis. Seeds the incident scope referenced in the SCOR About galaxy and demonstrates how the schema applies to real events outside IT-centric frameworks. Contact: william.o.ferguson@ethicallyhacking.space. License: CC BY 4.0. Namespace_display: SCOR. Namespace_long: Space, Cybersecurity, Operations, and Resilience. Steward: H4CK32N4U75®.
name: SCOR Incidents
